events.name: TOKEN2049 Singapore
events.venue: Marina Bay Sands (Sands Expo, all 5 floors)
events.rationale: Large international adult business crowd staying overnight in/near CBD; historically drives citywide compression. Back-to-back with F1 weekend — Oct 5-11 is peak compression.

events.name: F1 Singapore Grand Prix (+ Grand Prix Season Singapore)
events.venue: Marina Bay Street Circuit (GPSS festivities citywide 2026-10-02 to 2026-10-11)
events.attendees: ~270,000 over race weekend; heavy international fly-in. Concerts: Lana Del Rey, The Killers, Janet Jackson, Post Malone-adjacent lineup across 10 stages
events.rationale: Proven annual compression event for CBD/Quays properties; international adults, multi-night stays. First-ever Sprint format may lift attendance further.

events.name: Singapore International Energy Week (SIEW)
events.rationale: Week-long international professional conference; delegates are adult business travelers staying multiple nights near CBD.

events.name: BEX Asia (Built Environment Week)
events.rationale: Regional trade show; meaningful share of overnight ASEAN business visitors, but many day-attendees from Malaysia/local firms.

events.name: BIGBANG 20th Anniversary World Tour
events.attendees: ~50,000; strong regional fly-in fanbase (first tour since 2017)
events.rationale: Major K-pop reunion draws regional adult fans staying 1-2 nights; venue is Kallang not CBD, but citywide occupancy typically lifts. Similar past stadium K-pop shows produced solid one-night compression.

events.name: Post Malone - Big Ass World Tour
events.attendees: ~45,000; mix of local and regional fans
events.rationale: Stadium-scale international act on a Friday night; adult-skewing audience with partial regional fly-in and one-night stays.

events.name: Submarine Networks World
events.rationale: Small but nearly 100% international overnight delegates; niche uplift for CBD boutique properties, overlaps Post Malone week.
